programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Llega el día de la última fiesta en la casa y el desmadre comienza. La boss le entrega una carta a Jawy de Mane y la nostalgia lo invade.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienza para los de Shore y en esta ocasión Mazatlán será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo recibe una sorpresa y los shore se conmueven con su reacción. La celebración del cumpleaños de Xavier comienza. Chile y Jey tienen problemas de erección y Jawy reta a Chile a un duelo de boxeo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La espera termina y Jey por fin logra cumplirle a Nacha. Celia manda a un grupo a trabajar al acuario. La celebración de Xavier continua y las comadres se escapan del antro, lo que hace que Mane y Jawy terminen peleando.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy y Mane continúan. Xavi decide invitar a Pepe para que se quede en la casa. Los Shore comienzan a dudar de Fernanda. Karime busca al notario para que valide su virginidad y Mane y Fernanda terminan en un fuerte enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: Beginning in Kingsley, Cheshire, Phil Serrell and James Braxton head to auction in Liverpool on the penultimate leg of their road trip, Phil with a commanding lead. Can James find a way back into the competition before the trip is over?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton begin the final leg of their road trip in Wales. With James closing the gap, it's all to play for as the experts head for a final auction showdown in Newport, Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell embark on their penultimate leg. Christina had great success at the last auction. Can Philip catch her up as they kick off in Manchester and head to the auction in Melbourne, near York?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg on Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell's road trip. Phil won the last auction, but Christina is still in the lead. Who will win as they travel from Liverpool to their final showdown in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new road trip with old hand Charlie Ross and a new star addition to the roster: Glasgow girl Natasha Raskin. Beginning with the glories of the coastal southwest, they end up at auction in Ottery St Mary in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On today's trip Charlie Ross and the new girl, Natasha Raskin, are making for an auction in the Hampshire village of Swanmore but starting out in the famous naval city of Portsmouth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An old painting uncovered from behind layer upon layer of wallpaper and a watering can with holes in it are the surprising items that greet Hugh Scully and the experts when they visit Clacton-on-Sea, Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A piece of Georgian furniture, a mahogany table with a secret drawer, and early lithographs of Halifax are among the finds on Hugh Scully's visit to the West Yorkshire town.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A wood-and-plaster model of a butcher's shop with an adjoining slaughterhouse, a painting of a World War I nurse, and a pair of Elizabethan scenes delight Hugh Scully and the experts when they travel to Reading, Berkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and the team visit Coleraine in Northern Ireland where they examine a valuable portrait belonging to a local cathedral, astonishing 18th-century calligraphy by a man born with no limbs, and a sundial found in a hedge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Lake District town of Keswick in Cumbria, finds include a 17th-century bleeding bowl that is now used to hold a potted plant, a bronze statue of four cowboys, and a set of six Merrymen Delftware plates kept in a biscuit tin.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully visits the Bowes Museum in County Durham to present unseen sequences from earlier editions. Featuring photos of celebrities of the 1950s and 60s, a gold badge from an order of chivalry, and an illuminated manuscript.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The first of two shows from the gardens of Penshurst Place, Kent, where finds include a valuable Scottish impressionist painting, a pair of fine candelabra, and a "book of friendship" containing a possible Jane Austen portrait.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The second of two shows from the gardens of Penshurst Place, Kent, where finds include a tin-plate toy boat, a rare paper toy and a pair of cufflinks by a famous French maker. This is also the last Antiques Roadshow featuring Hugh Scully

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael presents his first Antiques Roadshow from the Victoria and Albert Museum in London. The experts uncover a treasure trove of unusual objects, including an original hand-written poem by WB Yeats, examples of Meissen, and a rare silver tobacco box.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A visit to Barnstaple in North Devon turns up an important enamel miniature by Henry Bone, a valuable collection of walking sticks, a World War I pilot's watch, a valuable painting from the Newlyn School, and a 19th-century native Canadian octopus bag.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit the Valley Leisure Centre in Biddulph, Staffordshire. Featured are a rare Wedgwood egg scrambler, a Constable sketch, an English repeater watch, a remarkable collection of ship's documents, and Queen Victoria's handkerchief.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Glamis Castle in Angus, Scotland. They find a posy ring with a grim story, a dining table used for resting a coffin on, diamond jewelry, 18th-century miniatures with musical connections, and the scrapbook of a WW1 pilot.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael introduces sequences from previous roadshows and recounts stories of the Queen Mother's early life at Glamis Castle. Featuring ivory figures, a pair of Chinese imperial bowls, a stone necklace, and a collection of handbag mirrors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Carter McKay has recently moved to Southern California to live with his father after his mother's death. When Hobie invites him to the annual father/son lifeguard competition Hobie learns the reason Carter is so embarrassed by his father.

programme.desc: When a woman Mitch refers to as “The Mermaid” turns out to be the wife of a crime boss, an FBI agent comes to catch him before he can escape the country. Things become complicated when Mitch and the catty FBI Agent butt heads.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The beach descends into chaos when DJ Larry "Loomin" Large announces a beach wide treasure hunt for a gold pirate doubloon worth $100,000. The Baywatch team is put on high alert when thousands of reckless treasure hunters storm the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When the hot Santa Ana winds move in from the desert, things start heating up on the Baywatch beach in more ways than one, as it seems like all the “weirdos” in the world have been blown to the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Tracy, a lifeguard-turned-hovercraft expert, arrives at Baywatch to demonstrate the benefits of the new rescue vehicle. Meanwhile, The National Pro Beach Volleyball Tour arrives, reigniting Matt's desire to be a professional beach volleyball star.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and Hobie rescue a young boy who is being harassed by a thug and take care of him until they can get him to his mother, but he seems to be hiding a deep dark secret. Meanwhile, CJ falls for a handsome young man who turns out to be taboo.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Joey joins Mitch and Hobie in decorating for Christmas. CJ has a great time working with Father Ryan but starts to worry that he may misinterpret her warmth as flirting, and that he may be considering quitting the priesthood for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan's visa is soon to expire, and he will be sent back to Australia unless he gets a green card. He plans on earning the money to purchase one in an upcoming boat race. Meanwhile Mitch’s mother visits.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is kidnapped by an eco-terrorist. The Baywatch team must stop the terrorist before she blows up an oil rig with Stephanie constrained inside it!

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is still mourning Tracy’s death, so Hobie seeks help from a radio show to help Mitch recover. Caroline resuscitates a man with AIDS, which puts a strain on her relationship with Logan. And CJ enters a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives a mysterious package his father had put together before he died. Mitch and his father never saw eye-to-eye, but this gift impacts Mitch more than he ever thought possible. Logan visits a hypnotist to deal with a past trauma.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil welcomes controversial YouTuber "Agent Sebastian" who runs a page called "Cart Narcs" posting hundreds of explosive videos apprehending shoppers in parking lots who do not return their carts to the corrals. Is "Agent Sebastian" breaking the law?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Author Dr. Philip Zimbardo, The Lucifer Effect: Understanding How Good People Turn Evil, and Dr. Phil examined what makes a good person do bad things. They continue to explore blind obedience to authority & an eye-opening experiment on group conformity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alisha says her son, Kevin, 10, pushed the family to the limit with violent outbursts. At home, knives and lighters are hidden & siblings lock themselves in their rooms at night. Alisha's says the 'future Kevin' may hurt the entire family or end a life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced parents Christina and Jim along with daughter Tara, 21, discuss that dad's new wife is the same age as Tara, how it's ok Tara is a webcam model to help pay bills, and that all this is making Tara a raging, angry monster with low self-esteem.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Police called it one of worst crimes ever. A boy held captive under the stairs. Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was starved and abused. His stepmother, Tammi Bleimeyer, now behind bars, denied hurting Jordan but her children reveal how they saved Jordan's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha launched a YouTube channel, "Truthfully Trisha". She says she deals with her family's disapproval and also her online "haters". Husband, Sean, says he's fed up with his wife's streaming. Can Dr. Phil help Trisha disconnect to focus on family? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil investigates a popular new website that dishes the dirt on non-celebrities. On creator Nik Richie's controversial site, TheDirty.com, people anonymously submit photos & negative comments about anyone in their community, tabloid style.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie is stressed raising 4 children--Brinley, 15, smokes pot, vapes, and runs away, once claiming kidnapping. Cassie's husband, Jonah, with his drug & alcohol abuse, is a danger to her children. Dr. Phil enlists Brinley's help to enlighten the family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodi Arias killed her ex-boyfriend Travis Alexander in 2008. He was stabbed more than 24 times, had his throat slit & was shot in the head. Behind-the-scenes trial details from prosecutor Juan Martinez & a juror & Travis's sister Tanisha speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil turns up the heat on the fireman who slept with his teenage nanny, and delves deeper into the affair that shattered the lives of a husband and wife, and her best friend and parents. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valentine's Day! Dr. Phil tackles romance dilemmas. Can't cook, don't know how to dress sexily, never buy the right gift, or have problems getting your groove on in the love department? Dr. Phil has solutions!Plus learn what men really want!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a tale of torture that shocked America and Dr. Phil speaks exclusively to one woman who lived to tell it. The first of three women abducted by Ariel Castro, Michelle Knight, recounts her story inside Cleveland’s now notorious House of Horrors. Part 1

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.

Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.
When Mary buys a piano, Rose peddles her teaching services to both her and Sandra--and the two pupils' rivalry inspires a competitive recital to determine who's learned more in three weeks.

When their church loses its lease, Mary coaxes an already overburdened Lester into supervising its move to a new location--but the parishioners are left without a place to worship on Christmas Day when the building mysteriously disappears
Mary and Sandra offer differing opinions when Rose is asked to spend the weekend in New York with the man of her dreams--who also happens to be one of Sandra's ex-nightmares.
When Calvin stays at the Jenkins' for the weekend, he misreads Sandra's attempts to cheer him up and falls madly in love with her, putting Mary in an awkward position.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hacia lo inimaginable
programme.desc: El asesino en serie Thomas Wilder desafía a Danny con un mensaje en su última víctima, convirtiendo el juego del gato y el ratón en una venganza personal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La milla extra
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony emprenden una búsqueda para encontrar a un testigo clave que huyó por miedo a represalias y convencerlo de testificar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Boomerang
programme.desc: Estalla la indignación pública cuando no se procesa a un policía que disparó a un adolescente, afectando a Frank, el alcalde y la oficina de Erin. Danny busca al autor de un posterior tiroteo contra un oficial, posible caso de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo de la UAC está investigando varios asesinatos en Bakersfield, California, que han dejado a las víctimas sin identificar. Además, el equipo da la bienvenida a la nueva agente Kate Callahan al redil del UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros, asesinatos en Seattle envían a la UAC en busca de un sospechoso que sufrió abusos en el pasado y ahora busca venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un avión de pasajeros se estrella en Colorado, llaman al equipo de UAC para elaborar un perfil sobre las extrañas circunstancias del accidente. Kate siente una fuerte vinculación con el caso, ya que le recuerda una tragedia familiar del pasado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial de la guardia costera en un barco abandonado y encuentra a una familia libanesa buscando asilo en EE. UU. Mientras tanto, Tony y McGee buscan la pareja perfecta para Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Makeovers give the dancers renewed confidence, alum Yuko shares exciting personal news, veteran Lisa makes a hard decision, and Kelli questions Alora-Rose about a rumored distraction.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week nine of training camp intensifies when Kelli and Judy confront Alora-Rose and deliberate squad dismissal decisions one week before the first game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/2/2019. Kamau visits Salt Lake City, Utah, to explore the growing LGBTQ+ community living in the epicenter of the Mormon religion.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/9/2019. Kamau visits Milwaukee, WI--the most segregated city in America--to better understand why living while black can be so challenging

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 6/16/2019. Kamau visits Philadelphia and Chester, Pennsylvania to learn about the toxic man-made disasters that have polluted these communities for generations.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 4/28/2019. Kamau visits Dallas, TX - the home of the Megachurch, to find out what is creating the new face of Christianity today, in a city where church and state are far from separate.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/19/2019. Kamau visits Jackson, MS to explore the divisive world of reproductive rights and reproductive justice including abortion, sex education, and women’s health.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/26/2019. Kamau takes a look at Washington D.C. through the eyes of the city’s residents who show him the vibrant culture of D.C. that is distinct from the Washington politics that surround it.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing suspect claims to be a federal informant, officers inspect an erratically driven car and find a safe, and a familiar face swears this time she's going to rehab.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rosa sufrió una golpiza en su casa, los atacantes buscaban droga que su hermana había escondido. Bianca tiene una fundación para ayudar gente sin recursos, pero está lucrando bajo esa fachada.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La renovación del estatus migratorio de Tony fue negada y será deportado. Por otro lado, Mia y Frankel son soldados y pasan por un estrés emocional que afecta la relación de pareja.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rebeca alardea de hacer cosas malas para ser cool, su madre la puso en evidencia. Urbano le alquila un local a una congregación religiosa, su esposa comienza a formar parte y sale embarazada.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Hasta que llegó su hora
programme.desc: La historia épica de un misterioso desconocido con una armónica que se une a un conocido forajido para proteger a una hermosa viuda de un asesino despiadado que trabaja para el ferrocarril.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: Un guerrero apache que desafía los intentos de Estados Unidos por controlar a los indios, lucha cuerpo a cuerpo con los soldados estadounidenses enviados a reprimir su rebelión.

programme.title: Hasta que llegó su hora
programme.desc: La historia épica de un misterioso desconocido con una armónica que se une a un conocido forajido para proteger a una hermosa viuda de un asesino despiadado que trabaja para el ferrocarril.

programme.title: Asesinato en el Expreso de Oriente
programme.desc: El famoso detective Hércules Poirot está en el expreso de oriente, pero el tren queda atrapado en la nieve. Cuando se descubre que uno de los pasajeros ha sido asesinado, Poirot comienza a investigar inmediatamente.

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás
programme.desc: Fantasía y realidad confluyen en este éxito memorable que explora los orígenes de una de las fábulas más maravillosas de todos los tiempos: Peter Pan. Nominada a siete Premios Óscar, incluida la mejor película.

programme.title: Stardust: el misterio de la estrella
programme.desc: Con la esperanza de conquistar a una chica, Tristán hace una promesa a una estrella fugaz. Pronto descubre que la estrella es en realidad una belleza celestial llamada Yvaine, a quien la vieja bruja Lamia intenta robar la juventud.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Escritores de la libertad
programme.desc: Hilary Swank protagoniza esta emocionante historia sobre chicos de barrio, que han crecido entre disparos y actitudes muy difíciles, y la maestra que les da lo que más necesitan: una voz propia.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Sólo una noche
programme.desc: La historia de un matrimonio que se enfrenta a la tentación que puede decidir su futuro cuando se encuentran separados durante una sola noche.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Ip Man

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: ternacional Donnie Yen repite su papel icónico como el gran maestro de kung fu, Ip Man.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Donnie Yen regresa a la exitosa serie de artes marciales de Ip Man. Cuando un desarrollador de bienes raíces corrupto (Mike Tyson) y su pandilla brutal intentan tomar control de la ciudad, Master Ip decide luchar contra ellos.

programme.title: Revancha
programme.desc: Tras un exitoso atraco, Porter es dado por muerto. Una vez recuperado, busca venganza y quiere su parte del dinero.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man es una adaptación galardonada basada en la vida de Ip Man (Donnie Yen), el gran maestro del arte marcial Wing Chun y tutor del legendario Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos. Desde sus humildes inicios en un pequeño escenario hasta llegar a las brillantes luces de Hollywood.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Argentina, 1985
programme.desc: A legal team takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship during the 1980s in a battle against odds and a race against time.

programme.title: Truman
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, Julián has decided to forgo treatment and spend his final days tying up loose ends when a childhood friend pays him an unexpected visit. Subtitled.

programme.title: Hellraiser: Hellworld
programme.desc: Cuando cinco fanáticos de los videojuegos son invitados a una fiesta especial de un misterioso destino conocido como Hellworld, sufren una noche de terror indescriptible que va más allá del ciberespacio.

programme.title: Zona de muerte
programme.desc: Christopher Walken se despierta de un coma debido a un accidente automovilístico, solo para descubrir que ha perdido cinco años de su vida y, sin embargo, ha ganado poderes psíquicos.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Insectos
programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: S.O.S. Hay un loco suelto en el espacio
programme.desc: El héroe espacial Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) y su amigo medio canino Barf (John Candy) están en una misión en su casa rodante voladora para salvar a la princesa Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) de Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) en una parodia inspirada en Mel Brooks.

programme.title: Team America: policía mundial
programme.desc: El Equipo América, una fuerza policial internacional dedicada a mantener la estabilidad global, descubre que un dictador sediento de poder negocia armas de destrucción masiva con terroristas.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Sin rumbo
programme.desc: Seth Green, Matthew Lillard y Dax Shepard actúan en esta comedia como amigos de la infancia que se han alejado, pero deben reunirse ante la repentina muerte de su cuarto amigo.

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Return Of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis directed, co-wrote and starred in this riotously funny movie that set a new standard for screen comedy and inspired the hit remake.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Jerry Lewis directed, co-wrote and starred in this riotously funny movie that set a new standard for screen comedy and inspired the hit remake.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: In their very first screen pairing, Walter Matthau (who would win a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his performance) and Jack Lemmon portray a crooked lawyer and his TV cameraman brother-in-law in this madcap tale of greed and recouping lost love.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It's Mrs. Naugatuck's wedding day, and Maude is determined that nothing will stand in the way of this special occasion, including Mrs. Naugatuck.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter have very different reactions when they find out that a visit from a prominent psychiatrist and his wife may result in an evening of mate swapping.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Even after her home is cleaned out by burglars, Maude is determined to keep her neighbors from arming themselves. Walter and Arthur want to form a local militia, but Maude insists that guns are not the way to go.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: It looks like Christmas at the Findlay's will be limited to a broken vase and a pair of old socks, until Arthur offers Walter a golden opportunity.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude begins to lose control of her efforts to raise money for a mental health clinic when her hero-worshipping cousin pays a surprising visit.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude storms out of her house and into a romantic little restaurant after Walter forbids her to have lunch with a handsome newly divorced 'friend.'

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: Se cuenta la historia de la bombero Michelle Baker. Después de conocer al Dr. Maynard Muntzing, quedó embarazada de él. Después de esta noticia, ella se enfermaba siempre que estaban juntos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En algún momento durante una fiesta de Navidad en el vecindario, Melissa Brannen, de cinco años, desapareció. Los investigadores recurrieron a la ciencia forense para ayudarlos a ver lo que se perdieron los testigos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 anys després de la seva estrena, 'Forensic Files' segueix sent la sèrie de crims reals més exitosa de tots els temps.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un policía fuera de servicio murió de un disparo, sus colegas oficiales estaban determinados a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ataque biológico
programme.desc: El Ataque bio terrorista de Rajneeshee en 1984: los investigadores descubren un complot para derrocar al gobierno después de que una cepa única de salmonela enfermara a la gente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Bloqueo del escritor
programme.desc: Una brillante joven arquitecta se enfermó y murió poco antes de testificar en un juicio penal. La autopsia reveló que había sido envenenada con arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana are trapped underground and the Daleks are moving in for the kill.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: The Zero Room is gone, and the Doctor’s regeneration is unstable. To help him, Tegan locates the tranquil world of Castrovalva and the TARDIS heads there.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Castrovalva, but the Portreeve cannot help the Doctor identify the problem. And the Master is taunting Adric, caught in his web of power.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: As recursive occlusion threatens to destroy everything and everyone in Castrovalva, the Master’s space/time trap is revealed, with Adric at its heart.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew. But Rachel hasn't kept up her end of the bargain, and now her mother wants her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Latvia - Gauja National Park
programme.desc: One of three Baltic States, Latvia’s rich forest holds the magic of Gauja National Park where Ashley rafts, canoes, treks, rides, and bungees through the largest National Park in the country.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina's guide, Andy, treats her to wonderful riverbed drives and wild encounters on foot.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Victoria Falls

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores the azure waters of the Aegean Sea, traverses the scenic Greek Islands, and immerses himself in the splendor of Venice.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Rivers and streams carve up the forests, drawing pygmy elephants to their grassy banks.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar is pleasantly surprised to find a place where the locals seem to all know each other, still wave to each car that passes and where the phone book lists people by their nicknames.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Slovenia - Eastern
programme.desc: On Wonders of Slovenia, a city settled during the Stone Age, holds the countries oldest traditions, and liquid library, including former Yugoslavian President Tito’s priceless favorite.

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: The incorrect floor nails are sent from SA, Ant goes to town to get some, but finds out the small bag comes at quite a price!

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2000 Mozambique Flood. Heavy rain through February and March 2000 led to massive flooding in Mozambique.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: Europe's rivers wind their way from the continent's snow capped mountains, through valleys and across grassland plains, carving the landscape and providing food and habitats for thousands of species.

programme.title: Animal Social Networks
programme.desc: Personality

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, Baggins finds it very hard to resist Legacy who seems to be on heat. Meanwhile, Chobe's health scare seems to be over and he is slowly getting back into training.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: It’s an emotional day at the cubhouse, the cubs will soon be leaving to become ambassadors around the world and handler Emily is finding it hard to let go. Recently Sebastian has been behaving badly and has started biting his handlers.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Slovenia - Central
programme.desc: The capital city of Slovenia is the heart of the country and one of the most picturesque cities in the world. Just a 45-minute drive north lies one of the most beautiful places in the world, Lake Bled.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: It's a messy business but Global Radar finds there is a big future in all kinds of waste and the value in what we flush or toss away is astounding.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina travels to Gonarezhou National Park in the South-East of Zimbabwe. Thomas, her guide, takes her to the breath-taking Chilojo cliffs, tracks an impressive buffalo herd and keeps his cool as they experience heart-stopping elephant charges.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Phyre has to be darted to keep the balance in the pride healthy, while Pazza shows off her highly possessive nature with an unsuspecting tortoise. And Milo demonstrates why he wears the pants around here.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Evan and Rondell demand justice from Greg; Titus and Amara work to reconcile; Stephanie pushes back against Greg's cousin Natasha.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie closes in on Evan, Hunter, and Titus; Evan and Rondell are greeted with a blast from their past; Evan and Bella endure the worst nightmare of their lives.

programme.title: Ambitions

programme.desc: Stephanie issues an ultimatum; Evan betrays an ally; Amara baits a witness; Damian takes a stand.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Rondell and Evan join forces to save Thelma's Place; an unlikely suspect comes forth as Senior's killer; Amara is taken off guard; Stephen and Hunter release their fury; Perla gets revenge.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam gets an unexpected wish from a dying teenager; Reggie wants Cam to pay for the family's expenses.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Complications arise when Missy works to get Reggie into an exclusive country club; a church pastor does not approve of Cam's sister or her lifestyle.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam and Reggie reunite with a childhood friend whose basketball dreams were derailed by a stint in prison; Cassie looks for houses; Cam is offered a shoe endorsement deal.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam intervenes when a former girlfriend tries to reconnect with Reggie; Cam and Reggie must decide between multiple shoe endorsement deals.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The Calloways upgrade to a spacious new mansion; team owner Jimmy Flaherty attaches serious strings to Cam's max deal.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam and M-Chuck are scrutinized by a district attorney; Uncle Julius feuds with a neighbor who won't take responsibility for his dog's actions.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cassie returns to the dating world and her determination to get what she wants sets her on a collision course with Cam; Reggie meets the peculiar and brilliant man who made Flaherty all his money.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy offers to help Ghost with his drug business on the condition that he uses Angela as an information source; Ghost is surprised when Kanan is released from jail.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Angela enjoy a getaway in Miami until reality intrudes on their fantasy life as a couple; Tommy and Kanan bond.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost struggles to keep Angela, Tommy and others in his control; Simon Stern prevents Ghost from regaining his club.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.
